result.stdout:
Description:
  Convert OpenAPI specifications to .http files for API testing

Usage:
  OpenApi2Http [options]

Options:
  -s, --source <source> (REQUIRED)  OpenAPI source (file path or HTTP/HTTPS URL)
  -f, --file <file>                 Input OpenAPI file path (use --source for URLs)
  -e, --endpoint <endpoint>         Base URL for the API endpoint (overrides servers in spec)
  -o, --output <output>             Output .http file (defaults to generated name based on source)
  -i, --ignore                      Ignore validation errors and generate the .http file anyway
  -v, --verbose                     Show verbose output
  -t, --timeout <timeout>           HTTP timeout in seconds (default: 30) [default: 30]
  --version                         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information

Description:

Usage:

  -e, --endpoint <endpoint>         Base URL for the API endpoint (overrides servers in spec)
  -o, --output <output>             Output .http file (defaults to generated name based on source)
  -i, --ignore                      Ignore validation errors and generate the .http file anyway
  -v, --verbose                     Show verbose output
  -t, --timeout <timeout>           HTTP timeout in seconds (default: 30) [default: 30]
